notes: Unauthenticated requests return 401 (session required). Live HTTP matrix not executed with a real session in CI; behavior verified against route implementation.
limit/pageSize: parseBoundedPageSize with LESSON_API_OFFSET_LIMIT min=1 max=50 default=20; invalid sizes return 400 with code page_size_limit or invalid_page_size.
Offset mode (default): page must be <= maxSafeOffsetPage(pageSize) (~201 for pageSize 20, MAX_LIST_SKIP_ROWS_DEFAULT=4000); page=999&limit=20 returns 400 code page_out_of_range.
Deep skip: skip beyond cap returns 400 code pagination_depth_limit.
Subscriber offset JSON includes totalCount (as total), currentPage (as page), totalPages (as pageCount), plus compatibility fields page, pageSize, total, pageCount, lessons, mode, pagination.
Cursor mode: paginationMode=cursor or non-empty cursor param; subscriber only; totalCount/currentPage/totalPages are null; pagination has nextCursor, hasMore, mode cursor.

checks.detail: searchParams.page; clamped with maxSafeOffsetPage(limit); rawPage > pageCount triggers redirect to canonical URL with appLessonsListQuery
parseLessonLibraryLimit — same 1–50 bounds as API default 20
qEffective applied in Prisma AND for content_items and pathway_lessons branches before skip/take
if rawPage !== lessonsBlock.page after clamp, redirect to /app/lessons?... canonical page
Previous/Next links and numeric page Links use href(p)
LearnerLessonsSearchToolbar wrapped in Suspense in page.tsx
useVirtualizer: only getVirtualItems() rows render; total height from getTotalSize()

virtualization.note: E2E browser verification of DOM node count not run; implementation matches @tanstack/react-virtual window pattern.

safetyUnchanged.detail: No edits in this pass; routes /app/lessons, auth via session, schema untouched, entitlements via lessonAccessWhere / resolveEntitlement unchanged by verification-only work.

part2_external_old_site.reason: Host is Linux: /Volumes does not exist (macOS Backup Plus paths unavailable in this environment).
part2_external_old_site.recommendedActionForUser: Mount the external volume or copy the old-site folder into the workspace (e.g. under a path like /root/old-nurse-nest-site), then re-run the audit prompt with that path, or run Cursor on a machine where /Volumes/Backup Plus/... is mounted.
